free_text: Cross sections for some reactions induced by neutrons
in the energy range from 13 to 18 MeV
irradiation. The reaction final products are identified
by their characteristic gamma-ray transition energies
and the least square analysis of the decay curves
Least square analysis of the decay curves
The proper choice of the irradiation angle and the
deuteron energy allows to get neutrons in the energy
